revision.comment: Create subpage namespace detection template. Returns "yes" if the given namespace (or this namespace) has subpages enabled, an empty string otherwise.
fix: with an empty first parameter we have to assume that the user provided {{ns:0}}
moved [[Template:Is subpage namespace]] to [[Template:Ns has subpages]]
use #switch
fix
fix
actually we don't WANT to 'fix' this
Fix FULLPAGENAME -> {{FULLPAGENAME}}. Also, make it robust against namespace name changes
Protected Template:Ns has subpages: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=autoconfirmed] (indefinite))
{{pp-template}}

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Ns has subpages]]": [[WP:MOVP|Highly visible page]]: Used in MediaWiki space, and soon on all editnotices. ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Allow substitution using safesubst: ([[meta:Help:Safesubst]])

Changed protection level of Template:Ns has subpages: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
convert this to use [[Module:Ns has subpages]] - this gets the subpage status directly from MediaWiki, avoiding the need to update the template when namespaces change
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:Ns has subpages|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Ns has subpages]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:Ns has subpages|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
